description: Thursday December 11 1958 William Whybarn Is Newest Member Os the Univac Scientific Exchange Kenan Professor of Mathematics William M Whyburn who is vice president of the Consolidated Uni versity of North Carolina has joined the central policy and inj formationsharing body associated with Univac electronic computers this week in El Paso Texas Mr Whyburn is a member of the Univac Scientific ExchangeUSE by virtue of acquisition by the University of North Carolina of a Remington Rand Univac 1105 Data Automation System The policy committee is meeting in El Paso at the Hilton Hotel The members of USE represent private governmental and mili agencies and educational in stmitions possessing computers o the 1103 and 1105 desigrthigh speed computing systems Pro gramming information which may be useful in any of 25 installation places over the nation are avail able for purposes of convenience efficiency and economy A shar Chapel Hill Boy Is Named CoCaptain Os Woodberry Forest Football Team Charlie Shaffer son of Mr and Mrs Charles M Shaffer of Chapel Hill has been named cocaptain of the 1959 Woodberry Forest foot ball team The Virginia prep teams coleader will be Mike Reily of New Orleans La an end Shaffer a
